nasb.text: He causes the vapors to ascend from the ends of the earth; Who makes lightnings for the rain, Who brings forth the wind from His treasuries.

esv.text: He it is who makes the clouds rise at the end of the earth, who makes lightnings for the rain and brings forth the wind from his storehouses.

cnv.text: 他使雲霧從地極上升， 發出閃電隨雨而來， 又從他的府庫吹出風來。

ccb.text: 祂使云雾从地极上升， 发出电光，带来雨水， 从祂的仓库带出风来。

csbs.text: 他使云雾从地极上腾， 使闪电随雨水而发， 又使风从他的库房而出。
